channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: INE Receives 12 Badges in G2's Spring 2025 Report, Solidifying its Leadership in Cybersecurity Training and Education
item.description: Global leader INE receives 12 badges in G2's Spring 2025 Report, including Grid Leader for Cybersecurity Professional Development, Online Course Providers, and Technical Skills Development.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
